abusefilter-desc: Waxay ku dabaqdaa habab qiyaaseed oo otomaatig ah wax ka beddellada
abusefilter-intro:
Ku soo dhowow is dhexgalka maareynta Shaandhada Xadgudubka.
Shaandhada Xadgudubka waa nidaam software otomaatig ah oo ku dabaqa habab qiyaaseed dhammaan falalka.
Is dhexgalkani wuxuu muujinayaa liiska shaandhooyinka la qeexay, wuxuuna oggolaanayaa in la beddelo.
abusefilter-mustviewprivateoredit: Sababo amni awgood, kaliya isticmaalayaasha leh xuquuqda ay ku arki karaan shaandhooyinka xadgudubka ee gaarka ah ama ku beddeli karaan shaandhooyinka ayaa adeegsan kara is-dhexgalkan.
abusefilter-warning:
'''Digniin:''' Tallaabadan waxaa si otomaatig ah loogu aqoonsaday inay waxyeello leedahay.
Tallaabooyinka aan wax dhisayn si dhakhso ah ayaa loo celin doonaa,
wax ka beddelka aan waxtarka lahayn ee soo noqnoqda ama daranna wuxuu keeni doonaa in akoonkaaga ama IP-gaaga la xannibo.
Haddii aad u malaynayso in tallaabadani tahay mid wax dhisaysa, waad dib u soo gudbin kartaa si aad u xaqiijiso.
Sharaxaad kooban oo ku saabsan xeerka xadgudubka ee falkaaga la jaanqaaday waa: $1
abusefilter-disallowed:
Tallaabadan waxaa si otomaatig ah loogu aqoonsaday inay waxyeello leedahay, sidaas darteed waa la diiday.
Haddii aad u malaynayso in tallaabadani tahay mid wax dhisaysa, fadlan u sheeg maamulaha waxa aad isku dayaysay inaad sameyso.
Sharaxaad kooban oo ku saabsan xeerka xadgudubka ee falkaaga la jaanqaaday waa: $1
abusefilter-blocked-display: Ficilkan si otomaatig ah ayaa loo aqoonsaday inuu waxyeello leeyahay, sidaas darteed waa lagaa hor istaagay inaad fuliso. Intaa waxaa dheer, si loo ilaaliyo {{SITENAME}}, akoonkaaga isticmaalaha iyo dhammaan cinwaannada IP-ga ee la xiriira waa la xanibay wax ka beddelka. Haddii tani ay khalad tahay, fadlan la xiriir maamule. Sharaxaad kooban oo ku saabsan xeerka xadgudubka ee ficilkaagu la jaanqaaday waa: $1
abusefilter-degrouped:
Tallaabadan waxaa si otomaatig ah loogu aqoonsaday inay waxyeello leedahay.
Sidaas darteed waa la diiday, iyo maadaama lagu tuhunsan yahay in akoonkaaga la jabiyay, dhammaan xuquuqaha waa lagala noqday.
Haddii aad u malaynayso in tani ay qalad tahay, fadlan la xiriir sarkaal sare adigoo sharaxaya waxa dhacay, waxaana laga yaabaa in xuquuqahaaga dib laguugu soo celiyo.
Sharaxaad kooban oo ku saabsan xeerka xadgudubka ee falkaaga la jaanqaaday waa: $1
abusefilter-autopromote-blocked:
Tallaabadan waxaa si otomaatig ah loogu aqoonsaday inay waxyeello leedahay, sidaas darteed waa la diiday.
Intaa waxaa dheer, si amniga loo ilaaliyo, qaar ka mid ah xuquuqaha sida caadiga ah loo siiyo akoonnada la aamini karo ayaa si ku meel gaar ah lagala noqday akoonkaaga.
Sharaxaad kooban oo ku saabsan xeerka xadgudubka ee falkaaga la jaanqaaday waa: $1
abusefilter-blockreason:
Si otomaatig ah ayuu u xannibay shaandhada xadgudubka.
Sharaxaad kooban oo ku saabsan xeerka la jaanqaaday: $1
abusefilter-degroupreason:
Xuquuqaha si otomaatig ah ayaa lagala noqday shaandhada xadgudubka.
Sharaxaad xeerka: $1
abusefilter-blockautopromotereason:
Kor u qaadista otomaatiga ah waxaa si otomaatig ah dib loogu dhigay shaandhada xadgudubka.
Sharaxaad xeerka: $1
abusefilter-accountreserved: Magacan akoonka waxaa loo xafiday isticmaalka shaandhada xadgudubka.
right-abusefilter-modify: Samee ama wax ka beddel shaandhooyinka xadgudubka
right-abusefilter-log-detail: Eeg gelinnada faahfaahsan ee diiwaanka xadgudubka
right-abusefilter-privatedetails: Eeg xogta gaarka ah ee diiwaanka xadgudubka
right-abusefilter-privatedetails-log: Eeg diiwaanka gelitaanka faahfaahinta gaarka ah ee AbuseFilter

action-abusefilter-log-private: Eeg diiwaannada shaandhooyinka xadgudubka ee lagu calaamadeeyay inay gaar yihiin

action-abusefilter-hidden-log: Eeg gelinnada qarsoon ee diiwaanka xadgudubka
action-abusefilter-modify-global: Samee ama wax ka beddel shaandhooyinka xadgudubka ee caalamiga ah
action-abusefilter-protected-vars-log: Eeg diiwaannada muujinaya doorsoomayaal la ilaaliyay
abusefilter-log-summary: Diiwaankan wuxuu muujinayaa liiska dhammaan falalka ay qabteen shaandhooyinka.
abusefilter-log-search-filter-help: Ku kala sooc adigoo adeegsanaya, kuna bilow "$1" shaandhooyinka caalamiga ah
abusefilter-log-search-filter-help-centr: Ku kala sooc adigoo adeegsanaya pipes
abusefilter-log-search-impact-not-saved: Iyadoo aan la tixgelin isbeddellada la keydiyay
abusefilter-log-details-diff: Isbeddellada lagu sameeyay wax ka beddelka
abusefilter-log-hidden-implicit: (lagu qariyey sababtoo ah dib u eegis waa la tirtiray)
abusefilter-log-cannot-see-details: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku arki karto faahfaahinta gelitaankan.
abusefilter-log-cannot-see-privatedetail: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku arki karto faahfaahinta gaarka ah ee gelitaankan.
abusefilter-log-nonexistent: Gelitaan leh aqoonsiga la bixiyay ma jiro.
abusefilter-log-details-hidden: Ma arki kartid faahfaahinta gelitaankan sababtoo ah waa laga qariyey aragtida dadweynaha.
abusefilter-log-details-hidden-implicit: Ma arki kartid faahfaahinta gelitaankan sababtoo ah dib u eegista la xiriirta waa laga qariyey aragtida dadweynaha.
abusefilter-log-private-not-included: Mid ama ka badan oo ka mid ah aqoonsiyada shaandhada aad sheegtay waa gaar. Maadaama aan laguu oggolayn inaad aragto faahfaahinta shaandhooyinka gaarka ah, shaandhooyinkaas lama baarin.
abusefilter-log-protected-not-included: Mid ama ka badan oo ka mid ah aqoonsiyada shaandhada aad sheegtay waa la ilaaliyo. Maadaama aan laguu oggolayn inaad aragto faahfaahinta shaandhooyinka la ilaaliyo ama shaandhooyinka la ilaaliyo ay adeegsadeen doorsoomayaal aadan geli karin, shaandhooyinkaas lama baarin.
abusefilter-log-hide-selected: {{PLURAL:$1|Gelitaanka AbuseLog ee la xushay|Gelitaannada AbuseLog ee la xushay}}:
abusefilter-log-hide-set-visibility: U deji muuqaalka gelitaannada la xushay:
abusefilter-log-hide-forbidden: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku qarin karto gelitaanka diiwaanka xadgudubka.
abusefilter-log-hide-no-change: Dhammaan aqoonsiyada la xushay hore ayay u leeyihiin muuqaalka la doonayo.
logentry-abusefilter-hit: $1 ayaa {{GENDER:$2|kiciyay}} $4, isagoo {{GENDER:$2|fulinaya}} tallaabada "$5" ee $3. Tallaabooyinka la qaaday: $6 ($7)

log-action-filter-rights-restoreautoprom: Soo celinta kor u qaadista otomaatiga ah

logentry-abusefilterblockeddomainhit-hit: {{GENDER:$2|$1}} wuxuu sababay in domain la xannibay lagu dhufto $3 isagoo isku dayay inuu ku daro $4

log-name-abusefilterblockeddomainhit: Diiwaanka ku dhufashada domain-ka la xannibay
abusefilter-list-lastmodified: Markii ugu dambeysay ee la beddelay
abusefilter-list-options-deleted-only: Muuji oo keliya shaandhooyinka la tirtiray
abusefilter-list-options-scope-all: Xeerarka maxalliga ah iyo kuwa caalamiga ah
abusefilter-list-options-search-irlike: Muujinta joogtada ah ee aan xasaasi u ahayn far waaweyn iyo far yar
abusefilter-list-invalid-searchmode: Habka raadinta ee la cayimay ma aha mid ansax ah.
abusefilter-list-regexerror: Khalad ayaa dhacay intii lagu jiray raadinta: qalad ku jira qaabka muujinta joogtada ah.
abusefilter-tools-text: Halkan waxaa ku yaal qaar ka mid ah qalabyo laga yaabo inay faa’iido u yeeshaan samaynta iyo ka saarista khaladaadka shaandhooyinka xadgudubka.
abusefilter-tools-syntax-error: Shaandhadu waxay leedahay hab-qoraal aan sax ahayn.
abusefilter-tools-reautoconfirm: Soo celi xaaladda si otomaatig ah loo xaqiijiyay
abusefilter-tools-reautoconfirm-submit: Dib u xaqiiji si otomaatig ah
abusefilter-tools-restoreautopromote: Kor u qaadista otomaatiga ah ayaa dib loogu soo celiyay iyada oo la adeegsanayo qalabka shaandhada xadgudubka.
abusefilter-reautoconfirm-none: Isticmaalahaas lagama hakinin {{GENDER:$1|xaaladdiisa|xaaladdeeda|xaaladdooda}} si otomaatig ah loo xaqiijiyay.
abusefilter-reautoconfirm-notallowed: Looma oggola inaad soo celiso xaaladda si otomaatig ah loo xaqiijiyay.
abusefilter-reautoconfirm-done: Xaaladda si otomaatig ah loo xaqiijiyay ee akoonka waa la soo celiyay
abusefilter-status: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|ficil|ficillo}} ee ugu dambeeyay, $2 ($3%) {{PLURAL:$2|ayay|ayaa}} gaaray xadka shuruudda ee $4, $5 ($6%) {{PLURAL:$5|ayay|ayaa}}na ugu yaraan la jaanqaaday hal shaandho oo hadda shaqaynaysa.
abusefilter-edit-token-not-match: Wax ka beddelka lama kaydin! Fadlan mar kale kaydi.
abusefilter-edit-oldwarning: Waxaad wax ka beddeleysaa nuqul hore oo shaandhadan ah. Tirakoobyada la xusay waxay khuseeyaan nuqulka ugu dambeeya ee shaandhadan. Haddii aad kaydiso isbeddelladaada, waxaad tirtiri doontaa dhammaan isbeddelladii dhacay tan iyo nuqulka aad hadda wax ka beddeleyso. • [[Special:AbuseFilter/history/$2|Ku noqo taariikhda shaandhadan]].
abusefilter-edit-oldwarning-view: Waxaad daawanaysaa nuqul hore oo shaandhadan ah. Tirakoobyada la xusay waxay khuseeyaan nuqulka ugu dambeeya ee shaandhadan. • [[Special:AbuseFilter/history/$2|Ku noqo taariikhda shaandhadan]].
abusefilter-edit-status:
$1 {{PLURAL:$1|ficil|ficillo}} ee ugu dambeeyay, shaandhadan waxay la jaanqaadday $2 ($3%).
Celcelis ahaan, waqtiga ay qaadato waa $4 ms, waxayna isticmaashaa $5 {{PLURAL:$5|shardi|shuruudo}} oo ka mid ah xadka shuruudaha.
abusefilter-edit-throttled-warning: '''Digniin:''' Shaandhadan si otomaatig ah ayaa loogu calaamadeeyay inay waxyeello keeni karto. Tallaabo badbaado ahaan, {{PLURAL:$2|ficilkan|ficilladan}} soo socda lama fulin doono: $1. Fadlan hubi in tirada badan ee is waafajinta la filayay. Haddii ay sidaas tahay, mar kale kaydi shaandhada si xayiraaddan looga saaro.
abusefilter-edit-throttled-warning-no-ac: '''Digniin:''' Shaandhadan si otomaatig ah ayaa loogu calaamadeeyay inay waxyeello keeni karto. Wax ficillo ah si otomaatig ah looma naafoyn, balse fadlan hubi in tirada badan ee is waafajinta la filayay. Haddii ay sidaas tahay, waad iska indho tiri kartaa digniintan.
abusefilter-edit-hidden: Ka qari faahfaahinta shaandhadan aragtida dadweynaha
abusefilter-edit-protected: Dhaqaaji isticmaalka [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Extension:AbuseFilter/Rules_format#Protected_variables doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyo] ee shaandhadan
abusefilter-edit-protected-variable-alre: Faahfaahinta shaandhadan waa laga qariyey isticmaaleyaasha aan arki karin doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyo.
abusefilter-edit-protected-help-message: Faahfaahinta shaandhadan waa laga qarin doonaa isticmaaleyaasha aan arki karin doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyo. Tallaabadani waa mid joogto ah oo aan dib loo celin karin.
abusefilter-edit-lastmod: Shaandhada ugu dambeysay waa la beddelay:
abusefilter-edit-consequences: Tallaabooyinka la qaadayo marka la is waafaqo
abusefilter-edit-action-warn: Kici tallaabooyinkan kadib marka isticmaalaha la siiyo digniin
abusefilter-edit-action-disallow: Ka horjoogso isticmaalaha inuu fuliyo ficilka la sheegay
abusefilter-edit-action-blockautopromote: Ka laabo isticmaalaha xaaladdiisa si otomaatig ah loo xaqiijiyay
abusefilter-edit-action-degroup: Ka saar isticmaalaha dhammaan kooxaha leh xuquuqda gaar ah
abusefilter-edit-action-block: Xannib isticmaalaha iyo/ama cinwaanka IP-ga si uu u wax uga beddelo
abusefilter-edit-action-blocktalk: Xannib isticmaalaha iyo/ama cinwaanka IP-ga si aanu wax uga beddeli karin boggiisa wahadalka
abusefilter-edit-action-throttle: Kici tallaabooyinka kaliya haddii isticmaaluhu dhaafo xadka heerka
abusefilter-edit-action-rangeblock: Xannib xadka IP-ga ee uu isticmaaluhu ka soo jeedo
abusefilter-edit-action-tag: Calaamadee wax ka beddelka si dib u eegis dheeraad ah loogu sameeyo
abusefilter-edit-throttle-hidden-placeho: Ku kala saar calaamadda comma si loo isku xiro AND, iyo khad cusub si loo isku xiro OR
abusefilter-edit-throttle-placeholder: Ku kala saar comma si loo isku xiro AND, kuna dar mid mid si loo isku xiro OR

Waxaa jira qalad ku jira hab qoraalka shaandhada aad sheegtay. Wax soo saarka falanqeeyaha waa:

abusefilter-edit-missingfields: Beeraha soo socda waa khasab in la buuxiyo: $1
abusefilter-edit-deleting-enabled: Lama calaamadin karo shaandho shaqaynaysa mid la tirtiray.
abusefilter-edit-restricted: Lama beddeli karo shaandhadan sababtoo ah waxay ka kooban tahay hal ama dhowr ficil oo xaddidan. Fadlan weydiiso isticmaale leh oggolaansho ku darista ficillada xaddidan inuu kuu sameeyo isbeddelka.
abusefilter-edit-protected-variable: Lama kaydin karo shaandhadan sababtoo ah ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku isticmaasho doorsoomayaasha soo socda: $1
abusefilter-edit-protected-variable-not-: Shaandhaddaada lama kaydin sababtoo ah waxay isticmaalaysaa [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Extension:AbuseFilter/Rules_format#Protected_variables {{PLURAL:$2|doorsoome la ilaaliyo|doorsoomayaal la ilaaliyo}}]: $1. Fadlan dhaqaaji isticmaalka doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyo. Tallaabadani waxay si joogto ah u qarin doontaa faahfaahinta shaandhadda isticmaaleyaasha aan arki karin doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyo.
abusefilter-edit-revert: Dib u celi ficillada uu qaaday shaandhadan
abusefilter-edit-test-link: Tijaabi shaandhadan adigoo adeegsanaya wax ka beddeladii ugu dambeeyay
abusefilter-edit-syntaxok: Ma jiraan qaladaad ku jira hab-qoraalka.
abusefilter-edit-syntaxerr: Qalad ku jira hab-qoraalka ayaa la ogaaday: $1
abusefilter-edit-warn-leave: Ka bixitaanka boggan waxay keeni doontaa inaad lumiso isbeddel kasta oo aad ku samaysay shaandhadan.
abusefilter-edit-bad-tags:
Mid ama dhowr ka mid ah calaamadaha aad sheegtay ma aha kuwo sax ah.
Calaamaduhu waa inay gaaban yihiin, waa inaysan ka koobnaan calaamado gaar ah, mana aha inay noqdaan kuwo ay adeegsadaan software kale. Fadlan isku day inaad doorato magac cusub oo calaamad ah.
abusefilter-edit-notallowed: Looma oggola inaad abuurto ama wax ka beddesho shaandhooyinka xadgudubka
abusefilter-edit-notallowed-global: Looma oggola inaad abuurto ama wax ka beddesho shaandhooyinka xadgudubka caalamiga ah
abusefilter-edit-notallowed-global-custo: Digniino ama fariimo diidmo oo la habeeyay looma taageero shaandhooyinka caalamiga ah
abusefilter-edit-invalid-warn-message: Fariinta digniinta lama reebi karo mid bannaan.
abusefilter-edit-invalid-disallow-messag: Fariinta diidmada lama reebi karo mid bannaan.
abusefilter-edit-invalid-throttlecount: Tirada tallaabada throttle-ku waa inay noqotaa tiro togan oo buuxda.
abusefilter-edit-invalid-throttleperiod: Muddada ceejinta waa inay noqotaa tiro togan oo buuxda.
abusefilter-edit-empty-throttlegroups: Ugu yaraan hal koox ceejin waa in la doortaa.
abusefilter-edit-duplicated-throttlegrou: Kooxaha ceejinta ma yeelan karaan nuqullo isku mid ah.
abusefilter-edit-invalid-throttlegroups: Kooxaha ceejinta ee la cayimay ma aha kuwo sax ah.
abusefilter-edit-invalid-group: Kooxda shaandhada ee la cayimay ('$1') ma aha mid sax ah.
abusefilter-edit-builder-select: Dooro ikhtiyaar si aad ugu darto meesha tilmaame ku yaal.
abusefilter-edit-builder-op-comparison-n: Qiime iyo nooc aan u dhigmaan ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-misc-contains: Xarafka bidix wuxuu ka kooban yahay xarafka midig ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-misc-rlike: Wuu la mid yahay muujinta joogtada ah ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-misc-irlike: Wuu la mid yahay muujinta joogtada ah, iyadoo aan la kala saarin xaraf weyn iyo mid yar ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-ccnorm-co: Caadiyee oo ka raadi xaraf dhowr xaraf hoosaad oo ku jira qaabka OR ($1)
Caadiyee oo ka raadi xaraf dhowr xaraf hoosaad oo ku jira qaabka AND ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-specialra: Xarfaha gaarka ah / tirada guud ee xarfaha ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-count: Tirada jeer ee xarafka X uu ka muuqdo xarafka Y ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-rcount: Tirada jeer ee muujinta joogtada ah X ay ka muuqato xarafka Y ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-get_match: Liiska u dhigma ee regex ee ku jira qoraal, mid kasta oo ka mid ah kooxaha qabashada ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-ip_in_ran: IP-ku ma ku jiraa mid ka mid ah xadadka? ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-contains-: Ka raadi xaraf dhowr xaraf-hoosaad oo ku jira qaabka OR ($1)
Ka raadi xaraf dhowr xaraf hoosaad oo ku jira qaabka AND ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-equals-to: Hubi haddii dood la siiyay ay la mid tahay (===) mid ka mid ah doodaha soo socda ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-strpos: Meesha uu ku yaal qaybta xarafka ee gudaha xarafka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-str_repla: Ku beddel qayb ka mid ah xarafka xaraf kale ($1)
Raadin iyo beddelid muujinta joogtada ah ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-rescape: Ka dhig xarafka mid dhab ah gudaha muujinta joogtada ah ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-funcs-sanitize: U beddel HTML entities xarfo Unicode ah ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-addedlines: Sadarrada lagu daray wax ka beddelka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-delta: Isbeddelka cabbirka ee wax ka beddelka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-diff: Farqiga mideysan ee isbeddellada lagu sameeyay wax ka beddelka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-removedlin: Sadarrada laga saaray wax ka beddelka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-page-title: Cinwaanka bogga oo aan lahayn meel-magac ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-page-last-: Waqtiga ka soo wareegay wax ka beddelkii ugu dambeeyay ee bogga ee ilbiriqsiyo ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-movedfrom-: Meesha magacyada ee bogga isha wareejinta ($1)
Cinwaanka buuxa ee bogga isha wareejinta ($1)
Da’da bogga isha wareejinta ee ilbiriqsiyo ($1)
Waqtiga ka soo wareegay wax ka beddelkii ugu dambeeyay ee bogga isha wareejinta ee ilbiriqsiyo ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-movedto-ns: Meesha magacyada ee bogga meesha loo wareejinayo ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-movedto-pr: Cinwaanka buuxa ee bogga meesha loo wareejinayo ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-movedto-ag: Da’da bogga meesha loo wareejinayo ee ilbiriqsiyo ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-movedto-la: Waqtiga ka soo wareegay wax ka beddelkii ugu dambeeyay ee bogga meesha loo wareejinayo ee ilbiriqsiyo ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-user-editc: Tirada wax ka beddelka ee isticmaalaha ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-user-unnam: IP-ga akoonka isticmaalaha (kaliya isticmaalayaasha aan soo gelin iyo akoonnada ku meelgaarka ah) ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-user-group: Kooxaha (oo ay ku jiraan kuwa si toos ah loo siiyo) ee isticmaaluhu ku jiro ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-user-block: Haddii isticmaaluhu la xanibay iyo in kale ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-old-wikite: Wikitext-kii hore ee bogga, ka hor wax ka beddelka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-new-wikite: Wikitext-ka cusub ee bogga, ka dib wax ka beddelka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-added-link: Xiriirro dibadeed oo lagu daray wax ka beddelka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-removed-li: Xiriirro dibadeed oo laga saaray wax ka beddelka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-old-links: Xiriirro dibadeed ee bogga, ka hor wax ka beddelka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-new-pst: Wikitext-ka cusub ee bogga, ka hor keydinta la beddelay ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-diff-pst: Farqiga mideysan ee isbeddellada lagu sameeyay wax ka beddelka, ka hor keydinta la beddelay ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-addedlines: Sadarrada lagu daray wax ka beddelka, ka hor keydinta la beddelay ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-new-text: Qoraalka cusub ee bogga, laga saaray dhammaan calaamadaha ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-new-html: Isha HTML ee la falanqeeyay ee dib u eegista cusub ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-restrictio: Heerka ilaalinta wax ka beddelka ee bogga ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-recent-con: Tobankii isticmaale ee ugu dambeeyay ee ka qayb qaatay bogga ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-first-cont: Isticmaalihii ugu horreeyay ee ka qayb qaatay bogga ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-movedfrom-: Heerka ilaalinta wax ka beddelka ee bogga isha wareejinta ($1)
Heerka ilaalinta wareejinta ee bogga isha wareejinta ($1)
Ilaalinta abuurista ee bogga isha wareejinta ($1)
Ilaalinta gelinta ee faylka isha wareejinta ($1)

Isticmaalihii ugu horreeyay ee ka qayb qaatay bogga isha wareejinta ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-movedto-re: Heerka ilaalinta wax ka beddelka ee bogga meesha loo wareejinayo ($1)
Heerka ilaalinta wareejinta ee bogga meesha loo wareejinayo ($1)
Ilaalinta abuurista ee bogga meesha loo wareejinayo ($1)
Ilaalinta gelinta ee faylka meesha loo wareejinayo ($1)
Tobankii isticmaale ee ugu dambeeyay ee ka qayb qaatay bogga meesha loo wareejinayo ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-movedto-fi: Isticmaalihii ugu horreeyay ee ka qayb qaatay bogga meesha loo wareejinayo ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-file-sha1: SHA1 hash ee waxa ku jira faylka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-file-bits-: Qaybo halkii kanaal midab ee faylka ($1)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-old-text: Qoraalka bogga hore, laga saaray dhammaan calaamadaha (hadda lama isticmaalo)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-old-html: Wikitext-kii hore ee bogga, oo loo turjumay HTML (hadda lama isticmaalo)
abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-minor-edit: Haddii wax ka beddelka loo calaamadeeyay inuu yahay mid yar iyo in kale (hadda lama isticmaalo)
abusefilter-history-error-hidden: Shaandhada aad codsatay waa la qariyey, mana arki kartid taariikhdeeda.
abusefilter-history-error-protected: Shaandhada aad codsatay waxay isticmaashaa doorsoomayaal la ilaaliyay, mana arki kartid taariikhdeeda. $1
abusefilter-history-error-protected-due-: Ma arki kartid taariikhda shaandhadan sababtoo ah ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku $1.
abusefilter-exception-unexpectedatend: lama filaanka ah "$2" ayaa ku jira xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-expectednotfound: Waxaa laga filayay $2 xarafka $1, lama helin (waxaa la helay $3 $4 halkii).
abusefilter-exception-unrecognisedkeywor: Erayga aan la aqoonsan $2 ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-unexpectedtoken: Astaanta lama filaanka ah "$3" (nooca $2) ayaa ku jirta xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-unclosedstring: Xadhig aan la xirin oo ka bilaabanaya xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-invalidoperator: Hawl gale aan sax ahayn "$2" ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-unrecognisedtoken: Astaanta aan la aqoonsan "$2" ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-noparams:
Wax xad-dhaaf ah looma siin shaqada "$2" ee xarafka $1.
Waxaa la filayay $3 {{PLURAL:$3|dood|doodo}}.
abusefilter-exception-dividebyzero: Lama oggola in la qaybiyo $2 oo eber ah ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-unrecognisedvar: Doorsoome aan la aqoonsan $2 ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-notenoughargs:
Dood ku filan looma siin shaqada $2 ee la wacay xarafka $1.
Waxaa la filayay $3 {{PLURAL:$3|dood|doodo}}, laakiin waxaa la helay $4
abusefilter-exception-toomanyargs:
Doodo aad u badan ayaa la siiyay shaqada $2 ee la wacay xarafka $1.
Waxaa la filayay ugu badnaan $3 {{PLURAL:$3|dood|doodo}}, laakiin waxaa la helay $4
abusefilter-exception-regexfailure: Khalad ku jira muujinta joogtada ah "$2" ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-overridebuiltin:
Si sharci darro ah ayaa loo beddelay aqoonsiga ku dhex
dhisan "$2" ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-usebuiltin: Isticmaal sharci darro ah oo aqoonsi ku-dhex dhisan "$2" ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-outofbounds: Codsi lagu dalbanayo shay aan jirin oo ku jira safka $2 (cabbirka safka waa $3) ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-negativeindex: Lambarro taban laguma oggola safka. Waxaa la helay tusmada "$2" ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-notarray: Codsi shay saf ah oo aan ahayn saf ayaa lagu sameeyay xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-unclosedcomment: Faallo aan la xirin oo ka bilaabanaysa xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-invalidiprange: Xadka IP-ga ee aan sax ahayn "$2" ayaa la bixiyay xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-disabledvar: Doorsoome $2 ee xarafka $1 hadda lama isticmaalo.
abusefilter-exception-variablevariable: set iyo set_var waxay filayaan in dooda koowaad ay noqoto xaraf go'an, laguna helay xarafka $1.
abusefilter-exception-unknownfunction: $2 ma aha shaqo sax ah ee xarafka $1.
abusefilter-parser-warning-match-empty-r: Muujinta joogtada ah ee la bixiyay waxay la mid tahay xarriiq madhan, oo ku taal xarafka $1
abusefilter-action-blockautopromote: Xannib kor u qaadista otomaatiga ah
abusefilter-revert-title: Dib u celi dhammaan isbeddellada uu sameeyay shaandhada $1
abusefilter-revert-intro:
Foomkan wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad dib u celiso dhammaan isbeddelladii uu sameeyay shaandhada xadgudubka ee ay sababtay shaandhada $1.
Fadlan si taxaddar leh u isticmaal qalabkan.
abusefilter-revert-preview-item:
$1: $2 {{GENDER:$7|wuxuu sameeyay}} $3 oo ku saabsan $4.
Tallaabooyinka dib loo celinayo: $5 ($6)
abusefilter-revert-search-legend: Xulo tallaabooyinka shaandhada xadgudubka ee dib loo celinayo
abusefilter-revert-preview-no-results: Weydiintu ma helin wax tallaabooyin ah oo dib loo celin karo.
abusefilter-revert-preview-intro:
Hoos waxaa ku qoran tallaabooyinka uu qaaday shaandhada xadgudubka ee dib loo celin doono marka la sameeyo falalkan.
Fadlan si taxaddar leh u hubi, kadibna guji "{{int:abusefilter-revert-confirm}}" si aad u xaqiijiso xulashadaada.
abusefilter-revert-success: Waxaad dib u celisay dhammaan tallaabooyinkii uu qaaday shaandhada xadgudubka ee ay sababtay [[Special:AbuseFilter/$1|shaandhada $2]].
abusefilter-revert-reason:
Dib u celin toos ah oo dhammaan tallaabooyinkii uu qaaday shaandhada xadgudubka sababta shaandhada $1.
Sababta la bixiyay: $2
abusefilter-test-intro:
Boggan wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad ku tijaabiso shaandho aad ku qortay sanduuqa hoose marka loo eego $1 {{PLURAL:$1|isbeddel|isbeddello}} ee ugu dambeeyay.
Si aad u soo shubato shaandho jirta, ku qor aqoonsiga shaandhada sanduuqa hoose ee sanduuqa tafatirka, kadibna guji badhanka "{{int:abusefilter-test-load}}".
abusefilter-test-shownegative: Muuji isbeddellada aan la iswaafajin shaandhada
abusefilter-test-syntaxerr:
Shaandhada aad gelisay waxay lahayd qalad ku jira qaab dhismeedka.
Waxaad heli kartaa sharaxaad buuxda adigoo gujinaya badhanka "{{int:abusefilter-edit-check}}".
abusefilter-test-protectedvarerr: Shaandhada lama soo bandhigayo, sababtoo ah waxay isticmaashaa doorsoomayaal la ilaaliyey waxaana laga qariyey aragtida dadweynaha.
abusefilter-examine-intro: Boggan wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad baarto doorsoomayaasha uu soo saaro Shaandhada Xadgudubka ee isbeddel gaar ah, isla markaana aad ku tijaabiso shaandhooyinka.
abusefilter-examine-intro-examine-only: Boggan wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad baarto doorsoomayaasha uu soo saaro Shaandhada Xadgudubka ee isbeddel gaar ah.
abusefilter-examine-syntaxerror: Shaandhadu waxay leedahay qaab dhismeed aan ansax ahayn
abusefilter-examine-incompatible: Isbeddelka aad codsatay lama taageero ee Shaandhada Xadgudubka
abusefilter-examine-noresults: Natiijooyin lama helin ee ku habboon shuruudaha raadinta aad bixisay.
abusefilter-examine-error-protected: Looma oggola inaad aragto diiwaankan sababtoo ah wuxuu isticmaalayaa doorsoomayaal la ilaaliyo oo waa laga qariyey aragtida dadweynaha. $1
abusefilter-examine-error-protected-due-: Looma oggola inaad aragto diiwaankan sababtoo ah ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku $1.
abusefilter-log-header:
Diiwaankan wuxuu muujinayaa soo koobid isbeddellada lagu sameeyay shaandhooyinka.
Faahfaahin buuxda, eeg [[Special:AbuseFilter/history|liiska]] isbeddelladii ugu dambeeyay ee shaandhooyinka.
abusefilter-log-invalid-filter: Qaar ka mid ah aqoonsiga shaandhada ee la cayimay ma aha kuwo sax ah.
abusefilter-diff-invalid: Lama awoodo in la soo saaro noocyadii la codsaday
abusefilter-import-intro:
Waxaad adeegsan kartaa is dhexgalkan si aad uga soo dhoofiso shaandhooyinka wikis kale.
Wiki-ga ilaha, guji "{{int:abusefilter-edit-export}}" oo ku yaal hoosta "{{int:abusefilter-edit-tools}}" ee is dhexgalka tafatirka.
Ka koobi sanduuqa qoraalka ee soo baxa, kadibna ku dheji sanduuqan, ka dibna guji "{{int:abusefilter-import-submit}}".
abusefilter-import-invalid-data: Xogta aad isku dayday inaad soo dhoofiso ma aha mid ansax ah
abusefilter-view-privatedetails-reason: Sababta loo gelayo faahfaahinta gaarka ah:
abusefilter-invalid-request: Codsi aan ansax ahayn! Waa inaad faahfaahinta diiwaanka gaarka ah ka gashaa foomka ku yaal [[Special:AbuseLog/$1]] isla markaana bixisaa sabab.
abusefilter-invalid-request-noid: Codsi aan ansax ahayn! Waa inaad faahfaahinta diiwaanka gaarka ah ka gashaa foomka ku yaal bogga faahfaahinta diiwaanka xadgudubka, isla markaana bixisaa sabab.
abusefilter-blocked-domains-intro: Xiriirrada dibadda ee u dhigma liiskan waa la xannibi doonaa marka lagu daro bogga. Domain-yadan waxaa lagu kaydiyaa [[MediaWiki:BlockedExternalDomains.json]]. Isku dayga lagu daro xiriirro la xannibay waxaa lagu diiwaangeliyaa [[Special:Log/abusefilterblockeddomainhit]].
abusefilter-blocked-domains-add-heading: Ku dar domain cusub oo la xannibay
abusefilter-blocked-domains-add-explanat: Halkan waxaad ku dari kartaa domain liiska domains-ka la xannibay.
abusefilter-blocked-domains-remove-expla: Boggan waxaad ka saari kartaa domain la xannibay
abusefilter-blocked-domains-attempted: Qoraalka aad rabtay inaad daabacdo waxaa xannibay shaandhadeenna. Domain-ka soo socda ayaa laga xannibay in lagu daro: $1
abusefilter-blocked-domains-invalid-entr: Gelinta $1 ee JSON waa khalad - waa inay noqotaa object leh oo keliya 'domain' iyo 'notes' fields, labaduna waa inay noqdaan strings
abusefilter-blocked-domains-domain-added: Ku dar domain dibadda oo la xannibay $1 oo leh faallo: $2
abusefilter-blocked-domains-domain-remov: Ka saar domain-ka dibadda ee la xannibay $1 oo leh qoraalladan: $2
log-description-abusefilterprivatedetail: Diiwaankan wuxuu muujinayaa liiska waqtiyada uu isticmaale arkay faahfaahinta qarsoon ee diiwaanka xadgudubka.
log-description-abusefilterblockeddomain: Dhacdooyinkan waxay la socdaan gelitaanka [[Special:BlockedExternalDomains|domain-yada la xannibay]].
abusefilter-noreason: Digniin: Si aad u aragto faahfaahinta qarsoon ee diiwaankan, waa inaad bixisaa sabab.
abusefilter-tag-reserved: Calaamadda abusefilter-condition-limit waa mid loo qoondeeyay isticmaalka gudaha ee AbuseFilter.
tag-abusefilter-condition-limit-descript: Tafatirrada ama dhacdooyinka kale ee aan lagu hubin karin dhammaan [[Special:AbuseFilter|shaandhooyinka xadgudubka]] ee shaqeynaya ([https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Extension:AbuseFilter/Conditions caawimaad]).
notification-header-throttle-filter: Shaandhada xadgudubka $2 ee aad {{GENDER:$1|hadda}} wax ka beddeshay waa la xaddiday.
notification-header-throttle-filter-acti: Shaandhada xadgudubka $2 ee aad {{GENDER:$1|hadda}} wax ka beddeshay waxay lahayd heer sare oo is waafajin ah, waxaana si otomaatig ah loo joojiyay {{PLURAL:$4|tallaabadan|tallaabooyinkan}} soo socda: $3.
notification-header-throttle-filter-no-a: Shaandhada xadgudubka $2 ee aad {{GENDER:$1|hadda}} wax ka beddeshay waxay lahayd heer sare oo is waafajin ah, laakiin wax tallaabo ah si otomaatig ah looma joojin.
notification-subject-throttle-filter: Shaandho xadgudub oo aad {{GENDER:$1|wax ka beddeshay}} ayaa lagu xaddiday {{SITENAME}}.
right-abusefilter-modify-blocked-externa: Abuur ama wax ka beddel domains-ka dibadda ee laga xannibay in la isku xiro
action-abusefilter-modify-blocked-extern: Abuur ama wax ka beddel domains-ka dibadda ee laga xannibay in la isku xiro
right-abusefilter-bypass-blocked-externa: Ka gudub domains-ka dibadda ee la xannibay
action-abusefilter-bypass-blocked-extern: Ka gudub domain-ka dibadda ee la xannibay
abusefilter-blocked-domains-cannot-edit-: Abuur ama wax ka beddel domains-ka dibadda ee laga xannibay in la isku xiro waa in lagu sameeyaa [[Special:BlockedExternalDomains|bogga gaarka ah]].
right-abusefilter-access-protected-vars: Eeg oo abuuro shaandhooyin isticmaala doorsoomayaal la ilaaliyay
action-abusefilter-access-protected-vars: Eeg oo abuuro shaandhooyin isticmaala doorsoomayaal la ilaaliyay
right-abusefilter-blocked-external-domai: Eeg diiwaanka hits-ka domains-ka dibadda ee la xannibay
action-abusefilter-blocked-external-doma: Eeg diiwaanka hits-ka ee domains-ka dibadda ee la xannibay
abusefilter-protected-vars-log-name: Diiwaanka doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyay ee Shaandhada Xadgudubka
abusefilter-protected-vars-log-header:
Tani waa diiwaan ka kooban:
# Eegista doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyay ee faahfaahinta diiwaanka
# Beddelidda heerarka gelitaanka isticmaalaha ee daawashada doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyay
logentry-abusefilter-protected-vars-chan: $1 ayaa awood siiyay {{GENDER:$2|isaga|iyada|iyaga}} gelitaankiisa si uu u arko doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyay
$1 ayaa joojiyay {{GENDER:$2|isaga|iyada|iyaga}} gelitaankiisa si uu u arko doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyay
logentry-abusefilter-protected-vars-view: $1 {{GENDER:$2|wuxuu arkay}} doorsoomayaasha la ilaaliyay ee la xiriira $3
$1 {{GENDER:$2|wuxuu arkay}} {{PLURAL:$4|doorsoome|doorsoomayaal}} la ilaaliyay oo la xiriira $3: $5
communityconfiguration-blockeddomain-des: Liiska domains-ka dibadda ee aan la xiriirin karin.
